title: MASLD / Fatty Liver Disease
subtitle: Understanding and managing metabolic dysfunction-associated steatotic liver disease
description: Clear, evidence-based information about fatty liver disease (MASLD) — what it means, how lifestyle changes can reverse it, and when to follow up with your doctor. Created by a Canadian gastroenterologist.

guidelines.title: EASL Clinical Practice Guidelines on MASLD
AGA Clinical Practice Update on MASLD
